who: medical clinic billing coordinators processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For medical clinic billing coordinators processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed reminders cause cash flow gaps. We automate scheduling and reminder notifications instead of manual scheduling and reminder notifications via email or phone calls.
problem: Timely scheduling and reminders for billing processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 coordinators with demo video
Participate in forums for sharing billing tools
try_it: Let users try simple scheduling interface and manual override for urgent changes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
